enrichment.short_description: Hiver is an omnichannel customer service platform that unifies email, chat, Slack, voice, and WhatsApp with AI agents and automation.
enrichment.starting_price: Free plan available; paid plans from $25/user/month (Growth, billed annually)
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Hiver unifies email, chat, Slack, voice, and WhatsApp into one shared inbox with AI agents, automation, and analytics for support teams.

features.title: Omnichannel inbox
features.description: Consolidates email, chat, Slack, voice, and WhatsApp into one shared inbox.

features.title: AI Agents
features.description: Execute multi-step support procedures across integrated tools.

features.title: AI Copilot
features.description: Assists with ticket triage, reply drafting, and task execution.

features.title: AI Help Center
features.description: Auto-generates help articles from resolved tickets.

features.title: AI Insights
features.description: Monitors quality and tracks customer health signals.

features.title: Workflow automation
features.description: Rule-based and agentic automation for routing and assignment.

features.title: Native integrations
features.description: Connects with Salesforce, Shopify, NetSuite, and 10,000+ tools.

pros: Wide channel coverage (email, chat, Slack, voice, WhatsApp) in one inbox
Free tier available before committing to a paid plan
AI copilot and AI agents built into paid tiers for ticket handling
Native integrations with Salesforce, Shopify, and NetSuite
cons: Advanced AI features (AI QA, AI insights, AI knowledge builder) are limited to the top Elite plan
Minimum of 2 seats required, jumping to 5-seat increments beyond that
Per-seat pricing rises quickly across tiers, from $25 to $85/user/month annually

faqs.question: Does Hiver have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Hiver offers a permanently free tier with shared inbox and ticketing for email, chat, and help center channels.

faqs.question: What is the cheapest paid Hiver plan?
faqs.answer: The Growth plan starts at $25/user/month billed annually, or $35/user/month billed monthly.

faqs.question: Does Hiver include AI features?
faqs.answer: Yes; AI agents and AI copilot are included from the Growth plan up, with AI QA and AI insights added on the Elite plan.

faqs.question: What integrations does Hiver support?
faqs.answer: Hiver lists native integrations with Salesforce, Shopify, NetSuite, and over 10,000 tools.

use_cases.title: Multi-channel support desks
use_cases.description: Teams juggling email, chat, Slack, and WhatsApp support conversations in one place.

use_cases.title: Internal service management
use_cases.description: IT, HR, and finance teams that need ticketing without complex service-desk software.

features: Email, chat, and help center channels

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Hiver?
paragraphs: Hiver is a customer service platform built around a shared inbox that brings together email, live chat, Slack, voice, and WhatsApp conversations in one place.

Paid tiers add AI agents, an AI copilot for drafting replies, automated help-center article generation, and quality-monitoring insights, alongside native integrations with tools like Salesforce, Shopify, and NetSuite.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Hiver is for
paragraphs: Hiver suits support, IT, HR, and finance teams that need ticketing and multi-channel conversation management without adopting a full standalone help-desk suite.

enrichment.short_description: Trengo is a customer engagement platform combining WhatsApp, email, social media, and voice into one inbox with AI Agents that automate replies.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Trengo unifies WhatsApp, email, social media, and voice in one inbox, with AI Agents to automatically resolve customer conversations.

features.title: Omnichannel inbox
features.description: Combines WhatsApp, email, Instagram, Facebook, and voice in one shared inbox.

features.title: AI Agents
features.description: Automatically resolve routine conversations; Trengo states up to 80% of volume.

features.title: AI Journeys
features.description: Automated flows for lead qualification and nurturing.

features.title: AI Voice Agents
features.description: AI-handled phone interactions.

features.title: WhatsApp Business API
features.description: Native WhatsApp messaging integration.

features.title: Business integrations
features.description: Connects with Shopify, WooCommerce, HubSpot, Salesforce, and Wix.

pros: Combines chat, email, WhatsApp, and voice into a single inbox
AI Agents can resolve routine conversations without agent involvement (Trengo claims up to 80%)
Established integrations with Shopify, HubSpot, Salesforce, and WooCommerce
Used by well-known brands including Uber and Porsche, per the company site
cons: No free-forever plan; the entry Boost tier starts at €299/month for up to 10 users
Conversation volume beyond the plan cap (500/month on Boost) costs extra at €18 per 100
AI-enhanced conversations are billed separately at €0.30 each
Enterprise pricing is quote-only

faqs.question: Does Trengo have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No published free-forever plan; pricing starts at the Boost plan (€299/month for up to 10 users).

faqs.question: Does Trengo offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Trengo directs new users to a trial signup from its homepage, though trial length and terms are not detailed on the pricing page.

faqs.question: What channels does Trengo support?
faqs.answer: WhatsApp, email, Instagram, Facebook, and voice, unified into one inbox.

faqs.question: How much do extra conversations cost on Trengo?
faqs.answer: Additional conversations beyond a plan's included volume cost €18 per 100, and AI-enhanced conversations cost €0.30 each.

use_cases.title: eCommerce customer support
use_cases.description: Online stores managing WhatsApp and email support at scale.

use_cases.title: Hospitality guest communication
use_cases.description: Hotels and travel operators coordinating guest messages across channels.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Trengo?
paragraphs: Trengo is a customer engagement platform that consolidates WhatsApp, email, Instagram, Facebook, and voice conversations into a single shared inbox.

Its AI Agents and AI Journeys automate routine replies and lead-nurturing flows, while integrations with Shopify, HubSpot, Salesforce, and WooCommerce connect conversations to existing business systems.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Trengo is for
paragraphs: Trengo targets eCommerce, hospitality, leisure, travel, financial services, automotive, and education businesses that handle high volumes of multi-channel customer conversations.

enrichment.short_description: Respond.io is an AI-powered customer communication platform unifying WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok, and other channels for sales, marketing, and support.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Respond.io unifies WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok, and other channels into one inbox with AI Agents for sales, marketing, and support teams.

features.title: Unified team inbox
features.description: Consolidates WhatsApp, TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook in one thread per contact.

features.title: AI Agents
features.description: Respond to inquiries, qualify leads, and complete tasks with built-in guardrails.

features.title: CRM integration
features.description: Brings full customer context into every conversation.

features.title: WhatsApp and Messenger Calls
features.description: Handles VoIP-based WhatsApp Business Calls and Messenger Calls.

features.title: Workflow automation
features.description: Automates lead routing and assignment.

features.title: Broadcasts and campaigns
features.description: Built-in campaign management and analytics (Growth plan and up).

features.title: Developer API and integrations
features.description: Zapier and Make integrations plus a developer API on Growth plan and up.

pros: Handles WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok, and voice calls, not just chat, from one inbox
7-day free trial with no credit card required
Official Meta and TikTok partner
Reports 99.999% uptime and a 4.8/5 G2 rating from 500+ reviews
cons: No permanent free plan, only a 7-day trial
Workflow automation and AI agents are gated behind the Growth plan ($159/month) and above
SSO and custom channels require the Advanced plan ($279/month)
Additional users cost extra on every tier ($12-$24/month per user)

faqs.question: Does Respond.io offer a free plan?
faqs.answer: No; it offers a 7-day free trial with no credit card required, not a free-forever tier.

faqs.question: How much does Respond.io cost?
faqs.answer: Plans start at $79/month (Starter) and go up to $279/month (Advanced), plus custom Enterprise pricing.

faqs.question: When was Respond.io founded?
faqs.answer: Respond.io was founded on February 17, 2017.

faqs.question: Where is Respond.io headquartered?
faqs.answer: Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

use_cases.title: Multi-channel sales and support
use_cases.description: Businesses managing WhatsApp, Instagram, and TikTok conversations in one place.

use_cases.title: Lead qualification automation
use_cases.description: Teams using AI agents to qualify and route inbound leads automatically.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Respond.io?
paragraphs: Respond.io is a customer communication platform that brings WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook conversations into one unified inbox for sales, marketing, and support teams.
It adds AI Agents for handling inquiries and lead qualification, workflow automation, and voice-call handling via WhatsApp Business Calls and Messenger Calls.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Respond.io is for
paragraphs: It targets B2C businesses managing high volumes of customer conversations across chat, social, and voice channels, particularly those relying on WhatsApp, Instagram, and TikTok.

enrichment.short_description: SleekFlow is an AI conversational operations platform centralizing WhatsApp, Instagram, and other channels into one inbox with AI agents for sales and support.
enrichment.starting_price: Free plan available; Pro AI plan from HK$399/user/month
enrichment.seo_meta_description: SleekFlow centralizes WhatsApp, Instagram, and other channels into one inbox with AI agents for sales, marketing, and support teams.

features.title: Omnichannel inbox
features.description: Centralizes WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, TikTok, LINE, Viber, WeChat, SMS, and Outlook.

features.title: AI Inbound Agent
features.description: Completes tasks like product recommendations and appointment scheduling.

features.title: AI Data Analyst Agent
features.description: Generates market insights from customer conversations.

features.title: Automation Flow Builder
features.description: Builds automated messaging workflows.

features.title: WhatsApp Forms
features.description: Collects lead-qualification and appointment-booking data via WhatsApp.

features.title: Analytics dashboards
features.description: Tracks conversations and conversion metrics (Premium AI plan).

features.title: CRM integration
features.description: Connects with Shopify, HubSpot, Salesforce, and VTEX for customer data.

pros: Free plan available to test core features before paying
Broad channel and integration coverage including WhatsApp, Shopify, HubSpot, and Salesforce
Supports 12 UI languages
Used by 2,000+ enterprises across 70 countries, per the company
cons: Free plan limited to 3 users and 50 monthly active contacts
Analytics dashboards, webhooks/API access, and role-based access require the Premium AI plan
Salesforce and custom integrations are Enterprise AI-only
Pricing is listed in Hong Kong dollars (HK$), requiring conversion for other markets

faqs.question: Does SleekFlow have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free plan supports 3 user accounts and 50 monthly active contacts.

faqs.question: What's the cheapest paid SleekFlow plan?
faqs.answer: Pro AI starts at HK$399 per user/month, with a minimum of 3 users.

faqs.question: What languages does SleekFlow support?
faqs.answer: Arabic, German, English, Spanish, French, Indonesian, Italian, Malay, Dutch, Portuguese, and Simplified/Traditional Chinese.

faqs.question: Does SleekFlow offer API access?
faqs.answer: Yes, webhook and API calls are included from the Premium AI plan.

use_cases.title: WhatsApp commerce
use_cases.description: Online brands using WhatsApp catalogs and payment links to sell.

use_cases.title: Multi-market support teams
use_cases.description: Teams needing a UI available in multiple languages across regions.

features: Custom monthly active contacts and users

long_form_blocks.heading: What is SleekFlow?
paragraphs: SleekFlow is a conversational operations platform that centralizes customer chats across WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, and other channels into one inbox.
AI agents built into paid plans handle tasks like product recommendations and appointment scheduling, while a Data Analyst Agent surfaces insights from conversation data.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who SleekFlow is for
paragraphs: SleekFlow serves small businesses through mid-market and enterprise B2C brands in e-commerce, beauty and wellness, automotive, travel, real estate, and education.

enrichment.short_description: Interakt is a WhatsApp, Instagram, and RCS customer engagement platform with a no-code chatbot builder, CRM, and AI agents.
enrichment.starting_price: Free plan available; Growth plan from $55/month
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Interakt combines WhatsApp, Instagram, and RCS messaging with a no-code chatbot builder, CRM, and AI agents for business communication.

features.title: No-code chatbot builder
features.description: Drag-and-drop WhatsApp chatbot creation without developer resources.

features.title: Multi-channel messaging
features.description: Automates conversations across WhatsApp, Instagram, and RCS.

features.title: AI Agents
features.description: Handle conversational interactions and query responses.

features.title: WhatsApp Store
features.description: Product catalog and payment integration for commerce inside WhatsApp.

features.title: Sales CRM
features.description: Pipeline management and lead organization for sales teams.

features.title: Catalog sync
features.description: Syncs product catalogs from Shopify, WooCommerce, and Excel.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Tracks campaign performance and team activity.

pros: Free Starter tier available with unlimited owner-role agents
14-day free trial on paid plans, no credit card required
No-code chatbot builder needs no developer resources
Serves 50,000+ businesses across multiple industries, per the company
cons: Free Starter tier excludes WhatsApp messaging (Instagram only)
Advanced chatbot flows with branching require the Advanced plan ($69/month)
The RCS channel is Enterprise-only
The Sales CRM (₹2,499/month) is a separate plan billed independently from the main messaging plans

faqs.question: Does Interakt have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Starter tier is free but limited to Instagram messaging, 15 custom fields, and 15 custom tags.

faqs.question: Does Interakt support WhatsApp on the free plan?
faqs.answer: No, WhatsApp messaging requires the Growth plan ($55/month) or higher.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial with no credit card required is offered.

faqs.question: How many businesses use Interakt?
faqs.answer: Interakt states it serves 50,000+ businesses globally.

use_cases.title: WhatsApp commerce automation
use_cases.description: Online sellers automating WhatsApp catalogs, payments, and support replies.

use_cases.title: Sales pipeline management
use_cases.description: Teams tracking leads through a WhatsApp-integrated CRM.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Interakt?
paragraphs: Interakt is a customer engagement platform built around WhatsApp, Instagram, and RCS messaging, with a no-code chatbot builder and a WhatsApp-native store for commerce.
It also includes a Sales CRM for pipeline tracking and lead organization, plus AI agents for conversational interactions and product recommendations.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Interakt is for
paragraphs: Interakt targets B2B sales teams and consumer businesses in travel, restaurants, spas, health and wellness, beauty, education, automotive, real estate, and banking/finance.

enrichment.short_description: WATI is a WhatsApp-first customer engagement platform offering a team inbox, no-code chatbots, campaigns, and an AI support agent.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: WATI offers a WhatsApp Business API inbox with no-code chatbots, campaign broadcasts, and an AI agent that deflects routine customer queries.

features.title: WhatsApp Business API
features.description: Connects businesses with customers at scale via WhatsApp.

features.title: No-code chatbot builder
features.description: Builds AI-powered, human-like chatbots for various use cases.

features.title: Team Inbox
features.description: Unifies sales and service conversations for the whole team.

features.title: AI Support Agent
features.description: Deflects up to 60% of customer queries, per the company.

features.title: Campaign management
features.description: Sends personalized messaging at scale.

features.title: Click-to-WhatsApp ads
features.description: Converts ad clicks directly into WhatsApp conversations.

features.title: Multi-channel support
features.description: Extends to Instagram, Facebook, SMS, and website chat.

pros: Deep WhatsApp Business API focus with click-to-WhatsApp ad support
AI Support Agent claims to deflect up to 60% of queries
Over 100 integrations available
Reports 16,000+ customers worldwide
cons: No free plan or trial period confirmed on the pricing page
Advanced chatbots and AI agents (Astra add-on) are limited to the Pro plan and above
Additional users cost extra on every paid tier
Multiple WhatsApp numbers and high message throughput require the Business plan ($240+/month)

faqs.question: Does WATI offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Not specified on the pricing page; a pay-as-you-go single-user option (₹999 one-time) is offered instead.

faqs.question: What's the cheapest WATI plan?
faqs.answer: The Growth plan starts at $20/month billed annually ($25/month billed monthly), for 3 users.

faqs.question: What languages does the WATI interface support?
faqs.answer: Portuguese, Spanish, English, Simplified and Traditional Chinese, and Arabic.

faqs.question: Does WATI have AI features?
faqs.answer: Yes, "Wati AI" includes Copilot, AI Agents, and Bring Your Own Agent (BYOA) support.

use_cases.title: WhatsApp marketing and support
use_cases.description: Brands running WhatsApp broadcast campaigns alongside customer support.

use_cases.title: High-volume WhatsApp operations
use_cases.description: Businesses needing multiple WhatsApp numbers and high message throughput.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is WATI?
paragraphs: WATI is a WhatsApp-first customer engagement platform built around the WhatsApp Business API, with a shared team inbox for sales and support conversations.
A no-code chatbot builder and an AI Support Agent handle routine queries automatically, while campaign tools and click-to-WhatsApp ad support cover marketing use cases.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who WATI is for
paragraphs: WATI serves e-commerce, eLearning, healthcare, and marketing-agency teams handling marketing, sales, and support conversations primarily over WhatsApp.

enrichment.short_description: DelightChat is an omnichannel support and WhatsApp marketing platform built for Shopify-based D2C e-commerce brands.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: DelightChat unifies WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email, and live chat for Shopify brands, with WhatsApp marketing and an AI response assistant.

features.title: Omnichannel inbox
features.description: Consolidates WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Email, Live Chat, and Messenger.

features.title: WhatsApp Marketing
features.description: Official API broadcasts, abandoned cart recovery, and order notifications.

features.title: Shopify integration
features.description: View and modify order data while replying to customers.

features.title: AI-powered responses
features.description: GPT-powered assistant drafts and refines support replies.

features.title: Automation rules
features.description: Keyword-triggered auto-replies.

features.title: Self-service widget
features.description: Lets customers check order status and browse help articles.

features.title: Mobile apps
features.description: iOS and Android apps for managing conversations on the go.

pros: Deep, purpose-built Shopify integration for order-aware support replies
GPT-powered AI assistant included from the entry Startup plan
iOS and Android apps available
14-day free trial with a 1:1 onboarding call
cons: No permanent free plan, only a 14-day trial
WhatsApp messaging charges are billed separately on top of the subscription fee
Support ticket and marketing contact volumes are capped per plan, with per-unit overage fees
Multiple Shopify stores require the Scale plan ($99/month) or above

faqs.question: Does DelightChat have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No; it offers a 14-day free trial rather than a permanent free tier.

faqs.question: How much does DelightChat cost?
faqs.answer: Plans start at $29/month (Startup) plus WhatsApp messaging charges.

faqs.question: Does DelightChat include AI features?
faqs.answer: Yes, a GPT-powered AI Assistant helps draft and refine support responses on all plans.

faqs.question: Is DelightChat built for Shopify?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is marketed specifically to Shopify-based D2C brands with native order-data integration.

use_cases.title: Shopify order support
use_cases.description: Support teams answering order-status questions using live Shopify data.

use_cases.title: WhatsApp marketing for D2C brands
use_cases.description: Brands running abandoned-cart recovery and broadcast campaigns.

features: Support across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Email, Live Chat

long_form_blocks.heading: What is DelightChat?
paragraphs: DelightChat is an omnichannel customer support and WhatsApp marketing platform built specifically for Shopify-based D2C e-commerce brands.
It combines a shared inbox for WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Email, and Live Chat with WhatsApp marketing tools and a GPT-powered AI assistant that drafts support replies.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who DelightChat is for
paragraphs: DelightChat is aimed at Shopify-based D2C e-commerce brands that need order-aware support and WhatsApp marketing in one tool.

enrichment.short_description: Kommunicate is a no-code AI agent builder for customer support that automates conversations and hands off to human agents with full context.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Kommunicate is a no-code AI agent builder for support teams, with human handoff, omnichannel deployment, and multi-LLM support.

features.title: AI Agent Builder
features.description: No-code platform for creating AI agents.

features.title: Human handoff
features.description: Native escalation to human agents with full context preservation.

features.title: Multi-model support
features.description: Compatible with OpenAI, Anthropic's Claude, and Google Gemini.

features.title: Omnichannel deployment
features.description: Operates across web, WhatsApp, email, and mobile apps.

features.title: Real-time dashboard
features.description: Monitors AI behavior and escalation patterns.

features.title: AI Email Automation
features.description: Automates email-based ticket handling.

features.title: Campaign messaging
features.description: Sends outbound messaging campaigns (Professional plan and up).

pros: No-code AI agent builder usable without lengthy implementation projects
Supports multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic's Claude, Google Gemini) rather than locking into one
Native human handoff preserves conversation context
30-day free trial, no credit card required
cons: No permanent free plan
Zendesk, Freshdesk, and Google Analytics integrations require the Professional plan ($200/month)
Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zapier integrations are Enterprise-only
Additional AI agents and team members are billed as per-seat add-ons on every tier

faqs.question: Does Kommunicate have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No; it offers a 30-day free trial with no credit card required, not a free-forever tier.

faqs.question: Which AI models does Kommunicate support?
faqs.answer: OpenAI, Anthropic's Claude, and Google Gemini, among other integrations like Dialogflow, AWS Lex, and IBM Watson.

faqs.question: What's the cheapest Kommunicate plan?
faqs.answer: Starter, at $40/month, includes 1 AI agent, 1 team member, and 250 conversations/month.

faqs.question: Does Kommunicate integrate with helpdesks?
faqs.answer: Yes, Zendesk and Freshdesk integrations are available from the Professional plan; Salesforce and HubSpot require Enterprise.

use_cases.title: Automated ticket deflection
use_cases.description: Support teams wanting to cut ticket volume with AI before human handoff.

use_cases.title: Multi-channel AI deployment
use_cases.description: Businesses deploying the same AI agent across web, WhatsApp, and mobile apps.

features: Web, mobile, WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram channels
Custom AI agents and team seats

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Kommunicate?
paragraphs: Kommunicate is a no-code AI agent builder for customer support that lets teams create automation without lengthy implementation projects.
AI agents can hand off conversations to human agents with full context preserved, and the platform supports multiple LLM providers including OpenAI, Anthropic's Claude, and Google Gemini.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Kommunicate is for
paragraphs: Kommunicate targets customer support teams at growing startups and enterprises seeking controlled AI automation deployable across web, WhatsApp, email, and mobile channels.

enrichment.short_description: Chatwoot is an open-source customer support platform unifying live chat, WhatsApp, email, and social channels with an AI agent and copilot.
enrichment.starting_price: Free (Hacker plan, up to 2 agents); paid plans from $19/agent/month
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Chatwoot is an open-source, AI-powered customer support platform with a shared inbox, help center, and Captain AI agent for automating replies.

features.title: Captain AI agent
features.description: Automates conversations and reduces support ticket volume.

features.title: Captain Copilot
features.description: Suggests answers and surfaces conversation history for agents.

features.title: Omnichannel inbox
features.description: Website chat, email, WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram, and Telegram in one place.

features.title: Customizable live chat widget
features.description: Embeddable, brandable chat widget for websites.

features.title: Knowledge base
features.description: Help center with AI-powered search.

features.title: Real-time translation
features.description: Multi-language support for conversations.

features.title: Self-hosted deployment
features.description: Open-source option for full data ownership.

features.title: Developer APIs
features.description: Enables custom integrations.

pros: Open-source with a self-hosted option for full data ownership
Free Hacker plan for up to 2 agents and 500 conversations/month
25,000+ GitHub stars and 400+ contributors signal an active open-source community
SOC 2 Type II compliant
cons: Free Hacker plan is limited to live chat only, excluding WhatsApp, email, and other channels
Voice support requires the top Enterprise plan ($99/agent/month)
Captain AI credits are capped per plan, with paid add-ons ($20 per 1,000 extra credits) once exceeded
SSO/SAML and audit logs require the Enterprise tier

faqs.question: Is Chatwoot open source?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is an open-source platform with a self-hosted deployment option.

faqs.question: Does Chatwoot have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Hacker plan is free for up to 2 agents and 500 conversations/month, live chat only.

faqs.question: What is Captain AI?
faqs.answer: Chatwoot's built-in AI agent that automates conversations, alongside Captain Copilot, which suggests answers to human agents.

faqs.question: Can I self-host Chatwoot?
faqs.answer: Yes, a self-hosted option is available for organizations wanting full data sovereignty.

use_cases.title: Data-sovereign support desk
use_cases.description: Companies needing self-hosted support software for compliance reasons.

use_cases.title: Open-source helpdesk alternative
use_cases.description: Teams seeking an open-source alternative to proprietary helpdesks.

features: Private notes, mentions, labels, canned responses

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Chatwoot?
paragraphs: Chatwoot is an open-source customer support platform that unifies live chat, WhatsApp, email, Facebook, Instagram, and Telegram conversations in one inbox.
Its Captain AI agent automates repetitive conversations, while Captain Copilot suggests answers to human agents; a self-hosted deployment option gives teams full control over their data.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Chatwoot is for
paragraphs: Chatwoot suits businesses seeking an open-source alternative to Intercom or Zendesk, especially those that value data ownership or need to self-host for compliance reasons.

name: Userlike
skip_reason: Product has been rebranded following acquisition: userlike.com now redirects to connect.lime-technologies.com, and the site identifies itself as 'Lime Connect (ex Userlike)' / 'Lime Connect (Userlike) GmbH'. The product no longer operates under the name Userlike, so it does not meet the same-name enrichment criteria.
